markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, GRC focus, and comparison article approach.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GRC Strategy:** Pivot from broad GRC topics to high-intent sub-pillars (e.g., Compliance, Risk, Audit) to capture users with specific needs.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Content Cadence:** Publish the buffer article now to capitalize on higher November traffic; target 40 articles total for Nov/Dec.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Comparison Articles:** Pursue a neutral "buyer's guide" format to bypass legal restrictions on direct feature-vs-feature comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [**Performance Metrics:** Shift from traffic-only KPIs to competitive "posture" metrics (e.g., share of voice) to better measure market position.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

## Topics

### GRC Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The GRC topic is too broad, attracting low-intent "what is" searches.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Solution:** Focus on high-intent sub-pillars (Compliance, Risk, Audit, Board Management) where users have specific problems to solve.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This strategy mirrors Diligent's shift to solution- and role-based pages, aligning SEO with the business's go-to-market approach.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Performance Data (Tyler):**](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Governance:** High share of voice/clicks, a direct result of aggressive H1/Q4 content investment.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Compliance, Risk, Audit:** Significant opportunity to build a stronger baseline.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pursue a multi-pillar GRC strategy to avoid limiting the brand to a single solution set.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Content Cadence & Production

  - [**November Progress:** 11 articles published, ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Buffer Article:** Publish the ready-to-go article now.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capitalize on higher November traffic before the holiday season dip.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Nov/Dec Target:** 40 articles total.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**GRC Content Spreadsheet (Kezia):** Shared a spreadsheet of old GRC content, ranked by search volume, to guide refresh efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### Comparison Article Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Create comparison articles (e.g., "Compliance Automation Software") to capture high-intent search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [**Legal Constraint:** Direct feature-vs-feature comparisons are prohibited due to past legal issues with competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [**Solution:** A neutral "buyer's guide" format that avoids direct competitor call-outs.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [**Format:** List solutions with objective descriptions (use cases, market positioning), not feature tables.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Use trust signals (awards, stats) to establish Diligent's leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach fulfills user search intent and provides clear signals for LLMs to surface Diligent as a category leader.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [Publish the buffer article.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Prepare a template for the neutral comparison article format.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [**Kezia:**](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Provide battle cards and a competitor list for the comparison article template.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
      - [Share relevant GRC case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [Ask legal to review the comparison article template once received.](https://fathom.video/share/S8jJB65izx__o-7nV3uJ2ps5zM5uTWhC?tab=summary&timestamp=2219.0)
